items.hook: Happy to help you narrow this down.
items.bridge: For a rehab evaluation, the concern, time window, and whether this is a first visit matter more than a quick yes or no.
items.next_step: Ask for concern, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user replies with booking facts.

items.hook: That is totally normal for a first visit.
items.bridge: A lot of first-time rehab users do not need more options, they need a simple way to narrow what fits their concern and comfort level.
items.next_step: Acknowledge the uncertainty and ask what concern is most important plus the time window.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares concern and timing.

items.hook: We can keep this simple and work from your event timing first.
items.bridge: When an event is close, the date, slot, and concern scope matter more than a long service lecture.
items.next_step: Ask when the event is, when the user can come in, and what they most want to ease.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher once the user shares timing facts.

items.hook: I can help make the price answer more useful.
items.bridge: For rehab consults, the real answer often changes with concern scope and whether this is a first visit, so one quick scope question helps a lot.
items.next_step: Ask whether the user is mainly concerned about neck tension, back pain, sports recovery, or a pre-event reset.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user shares scope.

items.hook: Nice to see you back here.
items.bridge: For returning users, it helps to start from what they want to review or ease this time instead of restarting from zero.
items.next_step: Ask what has changed since the last visit and when they hope to come in.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to FollowUp or Catcher depending on the user's reply.

items.hook: We can keep this easy and low-pressure.
items.bridge: Some rehab concerns feel more personal than they look in a comment, so the goal is to stay helpful without making the user feel exposed.
items.next_step: Reply with empathy and lightly invite the user to share concern and timing.
items.handoff_suggestion: Route to Catcher if the user continues with details.
